title: 約15億年前からコンニチハ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way home after some errands, Gold Ship
gestures to me.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, it's this park! This is where we bumped into
the princess, remember?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Man, that day was so fun! It was the total
package: a tale of love, war, and tears!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It sure was a shocker though—hearing that she
came from the future to save our planet from
those green beasties.
choice_data_list: Is it just me, or did you change her backstory?
Is it just me, or did you change her backstory?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What are those kids doin' stuck together like a
flock of sheep?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And hold up... Isn't that the princess in the
middle?

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text:
Have you heard the stuff this weirdo's always
muttering to herself?

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! The other day, I saw her drawing a
bunch of stuff in the sandbox and saying she was
"doing magic"!

text_block_list.name: Girl B
text_block_list.text:
That's sooo weird. Aren't you a little old to be
playing pretend?

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text: Wh-what do you care, anyway?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She seems to be in a tough spot.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, geez... I swear, kids can be so mean.
choice_data_list: Are you going to tell them off?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You mean like march over there and tell
them to knock it off? That'll just make them act
even worse.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Anyone sticking their nose in someone else's
beeswax like that is just bored, guaranteed.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And there's only one way to kick boredom in the
butt!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Watch and learn!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: One, two...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, Gold Ship leaps up, arcs through the
sky, and sticks the landing.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: THREEEEE!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Ack! What was that?!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Who're you?! An Umamusume?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Heh... It's been 700 million years since we last
met...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I've been hunting you down since the Sturtian ice
age, and now you're finally within my grasp!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Prepare yourself! We end this once and for all,
here and now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship gives me a look, indicating that it's my
turn to speak. I clear my throat and take up my
role.
choice_data_list:
Heh, once I escape to the future, you'll never
catch me!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... Hey, brats! What're you standing around
for?! Run and hide or something! Get the heck
outta here!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Umm? What are you people talking about?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, for cryin' out loud! Do you want to get eaten for dinner?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Look, in like three seconds, this baddie's head is
gonna pop open and another mouth is gonna
slither out to swallow you whole!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You really gonna stand there to see it happen?
Here it comes in three! Two! One!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Uh?! R-run awaaay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The kids get totally absorbed in Gold Ship's
improvised story and have a blast running around
until they're exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Today... was actually kinda fun...

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Yeah! I haven't run around like that in forever!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Bwahaha! Did you have a good time, kiddos?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Look, if the world ever gets too boring for you,
it's up to you to spice things up!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Wait, that was pretty profound, wasn't it? Think
I'll get nominated for a super special URA
commendation for that?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
All right, Trainer! I'm ready for my reward! I won't
ask for much, but special permission to live on
Mars would be a good start!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sun sets on our eventful day with Gold Ship's
giddy bursts of laughter echoing through the air.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I won't let you get away this time! All right, then...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, brats! Follow me into the forest! That's
where the baddie's time machine is stashed!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text:
Forest? Are you seriously calling the overgrown
bushes over there a forest?

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Forget that, time machines aren't even real!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Man, you kids really don't know the right way to
play in a forest, do you?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Heck, I bet you don't even know how to enjoy a
nice hike in the woods!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Good thing you've got me to teach you how to be
one with nature! Now shush and follow me!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Look under that tree! Do you see the time
machine part buried over there?

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Pffft, don't be ridiculous. There's no way anything
is under there.

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Hm? Wait, hang on a second! There really is something! See?

text_block_list.name: Girl B
text_block_list.text: Ewww! This box smells disgusting!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoopsies, my bad. That's the yakisoba sammy I
buried when I was trying to grow a sandwich tree.

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Yuck! Why's it that color?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, no need to get all worked up about it. We'll
find the treasure buried in these woods for sure!
The pirate treasure, that is!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Weren't we looking for a time machine?!

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Girl
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, the kids follow Gold Ship's
(questionable) lead on a grand treasure hunt in
the woods.
